title: Create Buddycards
description: Recycle your spare Buddycards into Create Set Buddycards!
body:
![Buddycards logo](https://i.imgur.com/8KGgIOI.png)
**A new expansion for Buddycards, adding a new set of Buddycards for the Create mod!**

Unlike the main set packs, you have to create your own Create Set packs by recycling old cards using various machines from the Create mod. This mod also adds other compatibility, like card stands that use the new stones added by Create. The new set also comes with all the traditional things a Buddycards set comes with such as Binders and Medals.
